overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting two cowboys riding horses through a dark forest at night, illuminated by a lantern. The party travels along a riverside trail, navigates rocky terrain, and crosses a shallow river before continuing on the opposite bank.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail between cliff and river

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along the narrow dirt trail following a companion rider

notable_agents.action: companion rider on horseback leading the way along the trail

entered.detail: narrow dirt path winding through the forest
dark flowing river running parallel to the trail
steep rock wall lining the right side of the trail
tall evergreen trees silhouetted against the night sky
mountain range visible on the horizon under moonlight

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, with the camera following a horse rider from behind. A companion rider leads ahead along the narrow dirt path, which runs between a rocky cliff face on the right and a flowing river on the left. Pine trees line the route and distant mountains are visible on the horizon, all illuminated by the warm glow of a lantern.

events.description: trail surface changes from dirt to rocky gravel as the path descends toward the water
horse slows and carefully steps into the shallow river water

agents.ego_description: carefully guiding the horse down the rocky slope toward the river's edge

notable_agents.action: companion rider ahead dismounting or waiting at the water's edge

entered.detail: uneven rocky terrain replacing the smooth dirt path
massive rock formations scattered along the right side

segments.scene_description: The terrain transitions from forest trail to rocky shoreline as the riders descend toward the river. The ground becomes uneven gravel and large boulders appear on the right. The river draws closer, eventually filling the center of the frame as the horse carefully steps into the shallow water at the segment's end.

events.description: fully enters the river, water splashing around the horse's legs
exits the river onto the grassy bank on the opposite side

agents.ego_description: riding through the shallow river and emerging onto the far bank

entered.detail: grassy slope rising from the water's edge on the far side

segments.scene_description: The horse wades through the shallow river, water reflecting the lantern light. After crossing, the rider emerges onto a grassy riverbank. The river now flows to the left while the trail continues through more open terrain with scattered trees. The distant mountains remain visible ahead as the journey continues along the opposite shore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark forest trail that descends into a river crossing and emerges onto an open riverbank. It begins by following a horse rider from behind along a narrow dirt path, flanked by a rocky cliff and a flowing river under the warm glow of a lantern. As the riders move forward, the forest trail transitions into a rocky shoreline of uneven gravel and large boulders before the horse carefully steps into the shallow water. The camera then tracks the horse as it wades across the reflecting river, eventually emerging onto a grassy bank where the terrain opens up. Finally, the scene shifts to a path with scattered trees along the opposite shore, continuing toward distant mountains visible on the horizon.
